title: Opening Gap Size & Direction Signal Classifier
summary: At market open, compute the overnight gap for each candidate ticker and for SPY as a market-level context signal. Classify the gap into one of four buckets: small gap-down (<0.35%), large gap-down (>0.35%), small gap-up (<0.35%), large gap-up (>0.35%). Each bucket has a different statistically-supported entry bias: small gaps of either direction have 69–92% fill rates (mean-reversion favour), large gap-downs on non-Mondays have a contrarian long opportunity after the first 30 minutes, and large gap-ups (>1%) on Monday have historically been poor continuation entries. This data is already computable via yfinance's prev_close vs current open — zero additional data cost.
research_topic: Win Rate Improvement — Backtesting Robustness, Walk-Forward Validation & Intraday Timing Signals
expected_impact: +3–5% win rate improvement by routing gap setups to the statistically correct strategy; gap-downs <0.35% have 69%+ same-day fill rate; large Monday gap-downs (>1%) have negative mean-reversion expectancy and should be suppressed
